name: Revascularization Procedure Codes
description: CPT codes for coronary artery bypass grafting (CABG), percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI), percutaneous transluminal procedures, coronary endarterectomy, and lower extremity revascularization. Used in cardiovascular and ischemic vascular disease quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
